task_completion.description: Load the esophageal cancer dataset into Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis window is open and shows 'esophageal_cancer.csv' loaded in the data source or record count section.

task_completion.description: Conduct TABLES analysis for CaseStatus by AlcoholGroup
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info output window displays a cross-tabulation (TABLES) for 'CaseStatus' and 'AlcoholGroup', including statistical test results like Chi-Square.

task_completion.description: Conduct TABLES analysis for CaseStatus by TobaccoGroup
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info output window displays a cross-tabulation (TABLES) for 'CaseStatus' and 'TobaccoGroup', including statistical test results like Chi-Square.

task_completion.description: Create the dose_response_results.txt file in the EpiResults directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open showing a file named 'dose_response_results.txt' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiResults\'.

task_completion.description: Record the Alcohol trend chi-square, p-value, and dose-response conclusion
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains 'Alcohol_ChiSq_Trend: [value around 134.87]', 'Alcohol_Trend_PValue: [value < 0.001]', and 'Alcohol_DoseResponse: Yes'.

task_completion.description: Record the Tobacco trend chi-square, p-value, and dose-response conclusion
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains 'Tobacco_ChiSq_Trend: [value around 32.86]', 'Tobacco_Trend_PValue: [value < 0.001]', and 'Tobacco_DoseResponse: Yes'.

integrity.description: Agent used Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Epi Info 7 graphical interface being used to generate the tables, rather than terminal commands, Python, or R scripts.

integrity.description: Values in the text file match the Epi Info 7 output
integrity.visual_evidence: The Chi-Square and p-values typed into the text file should visibly match the output generated in the Epi Info 7 analysis window.

integrity.description: Agent actually performed the analysis rather than guessing the expected values
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of the Epi Info 7 output screens with the calculated statistics confirms the agent derived the answers from the software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is the Breslow-Day esoph dataset. The expected Chi-Square for Linear Trend for Alcohol is approximately 134.87 (acceptable range: 50-200) with a p-value < 0.001. The expected Chi-Square for Linear Trend for Tobacco is approximately 32.86 (acceptable range: 15-100) with a p-value < 0.001. Both Alcohol and Tobacco exhibit a significant dose-response relationship, so 'Alcohol_DoseResponse' and 'Tobacco_DoseResponse' should both be recorded as 'Yes'.
